=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/globalDateInEffect.ts(6,15): warning TS377067: This Effect code uses `Date.now()`, time access in Effect code is represented through `Clock` from Effect. effect(globalDateInEffect)
/.src/globalDateInEffect.ts(12,15): warning TS377069: This Effect code constructs `new Date()`, date values in Effect code are represented through `DateTime` from Effect. effect(globalDateInEffect)
/.src/globalDateInEffect.ts(18,16): warning TS377069: This Effect code constructs `new Date()`, date values in Effect code are represented through `DateTime` from Effect. effect(globalDateInEffect)
/.src/globalDateInEffect.ts(25,15): warning TS377067: This Effect code uses `Date.now()`, time access in Effect code is represented through `Clock` from Effect. effect(globalDateInEffect)


==== /.src/globalDateInEffect.ts (4 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics globalDateInEffect:warning
    import { Effect } from "effect"
    
    // Should trigger - Date.now() inside Effect.gen
    export const dateNowInGen = Effect.gen(function*() {
      const now = Date.now()
                  ~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377067: This Effect code uses `Date.now()`, time access in Effect code is represented through `Clock` from Effect. effect(globalDateInEffect)
      return now
    })
    
    // Should trigger - new Date() inside Effect.gen
    export const newDateInGen = Effect.gen(function*() {
      const now = new Date()
                  ~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377069: This Effect code constructs `new Date()`, date values in Effect code are represented through `DateTime` from Effect. effect(globalDateInEffect)
      return now
    })
    
    // Should trigger - new Date(...) with args inside Effect.fn
    export const newDateWithArgsInFn = Effect.fn("newDateWithArgsInFn")(function*() {
      const date = new Date("2024-01-01")
                   ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377069: This Effect code constructs `new Date()`, date values in Effect code are represented through `DateTime` from Effect. effect(globalDateInEffect)
      return date
    })
    
    // Should trigger - aliased Date
    export const aliasedDate = Effect.gen(function*() {
      const MyDate = Date
      const now = MyDate.now()
                  ~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377067: This Effect code uses `Date.now()`, time access in Effect code is represented through `Clock` from Effect. effect(globalDateInEffect)
      return now
    })
    
    // Should NOT trigger - Date.now() at module level
    const _moduleLevel = Date.now()
    
    // Should NOT trigger - new Date() in regular function
    const _regularNewDate = () => {
      return new Date()
    }
    
    // Should NOT trigger - Date.now() inside nested arrow in generator
    export const nestedArrowInGen = Effect.gen(function*() {
      const fn = () => Date.now()
      return fn
    })
